Describe the sequence of actions performed by the man in the leather jacket throughout the clip.
canonical_answer: At 4s, a bald man in a leather jacket appears before a German flag; at 6s, he opens his mouth to speak; at 10s, text appears behind him on a blue background; at 12s, he raises both arms with palms up; at 14s, he places a hand on an older man's shoulder.

question: What visual changes occur in the background and personnel during the video?
canonical_answer: At 4s, a German flag appears behind the speaker; at 10s, the background shifts to solid blue with white text; at 12s, the flag returns behind the man; at 14s, an older man in a suit enters the frame; at 15s, the speaker places a hand on the suit.
